overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in cowboy attire walking through the town of Blackwater. The clip begins on a covered waterfront pier, transitions across an open boardwalk, and continues down the dirt main street lined with wooden frontier buildings, horses, and NPC townsfolk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront pier with white railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pier toward the town exit, passing NPCs in period clothing

notable_agents.action: woman in long dress walking toward the camera along the right railing
man in vest and hat walking in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with metal supports covering the pier walkway
large sign with 'BLACK WATER' text at the entrance to the pier
white painted wooden railings lining both sides of the pier
two-story blue wooden building with white trim visible to the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered waterfront pier with white railings and a wooden roof structure. The 'BLACK WATER' sign marks the entrance ahead. Sparse pedestrian NPCs in Western attire walk in opposing directions, and a blue wooden building stands visible to the right through the railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open boardwalk plaza transitioning to dirt main street

events.description: exits the covered pier into open sunlight, revealing the full sky and town ahead
steps off the wooden boardwalk onto the dirt ground of the main street

agents.ego_description: walking out from the covered pier onto the open boardwalk and approaching the decorative town archway

notable_agents.action: man in yellow coat and hat walking toward the camera, passing by on the right

entered.detail: ornate metal and wood archway marking the entrance to the town center
wooden park benches lined along the left side of the boardwalk
unpaved dirt ground transitioning from the wooden planks ahead

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered pier into bright open sunlight, revealing a decorative archway entrance to the town. Wooden benches line the left side of the boardwalk. A man in a yellow coat passes by as the character approaches the transition from wooden planks to dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier town main street with wooden storefronts and telegraph poles

events.description: horse and rider pass by on the left side of the street
horse-drawn carriage with covered wagon passes on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking down the dirt main street alongside wooden frontier buildings, maintaining a steady pace behind an NPC companion

notable_agents.action: man in dark coat walking in the same direction ahead on the left sidewalk
horse-drawn carriage moving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: two-story wooden frontier buildings with balconies and false fronts lining the right side
wooden utility poles with crossbars and wires running along the left side of the street
scattered green trees visible beyond the buildings on the left side
wooden picket fence running along the left edge of the dirt road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the unpaved main street of a frontier town, passing wooden saloons and storefronts with false fronts. Telegraph poles line the left side while horses and carriages occasionally pass by. The dirt road stretches ahead through the Western town with scattered trees visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded waterfront pier into the bright, open main street of a frontier town. It begins under a wooden roof structure with white railings, passing pedestrians and a blue building as the character moves toward a sign marking the entrance to Blackwater. As the character exits the covered pier, the scene opens into brilliant sunlight beneath a decorative archway, moving past wooden benches and a man in a yellow coat. The environment then shifts from the wooden planks of the boardwalk to an unpaved dirt road lined with telegraph poles and wooden storefronts. Finally, the camera continues down the main street, passing horses and carriages before the road stretches toward distant trees.
